message:
Merge PR #2938: fix: suppress Dolt auto-start for Gas Town agents

Sets BEADS_DOLT_AUTO_START=0 for all GT agents to prevent bd from
launching shadow Dolt servers that conflict with the managed server.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2938
Author: mmlac

Co-authored-by: Markus Lachinger <markus@lachinger.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
